executives.name: Leon Topalian
executives.background: Mr. Topalian has served as Chair of the Board since September 2022, President and Chief Executive Officer since January 2020, and President and Chief Operating Officer from September 2019 to December 2019. He previously served as an Executive Vice President from 2017 to 2019 and a Vice President from 2013 to 2017. He has been with Nucor since 1996.

tenure_dates.title: Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Stephen Laxton
executives.background: Mr. Laxton has served as Chief Financial Officer, Treasurer and Executive Vice President since March 2022. He previously served as Vice President of Business Development and Strategic Planning from 2014 to 2022. He joined Nucor in 2003.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer, Treasurer and Executive Vice President

executives.name: David Sumoski
executives.background: Mr. Sumoski has served as Chief Operating Officer and Executive Vice President since January 2021. He previously served as Executive Vice President from 2014 to 2020 and Vice President from 2010 to 2014. He has been with Nucor since 1987.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Operating Officer and Executive Vice President

executives.name: Douglas Jellison
executives.background: Mr. Jellison has served as Executive Vice President since 2021. He previously served as Vice President from 2012 to 2020. He has been with Nucor since 1990.

executives.name: Greg Murphy
executives.background: Mr. Murphy has served as Executive Vice President of Business Services and General Counsel since 2021. He previously served as Vice President and General Counsel from 2015 to 2020.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Business Services and General Counsel

executives.name: Daniel Needham
executives.background: Mr. Needham has served as Executive Vice President since 2021. He previously served as Vice President from 2019 to 2021. He has been with Nucor since 1993.

executives.name: Chad Utermark
executives.background: Mr. Utermark has served as Executive Vice President since 2014. He has been with Nucor since 1992.

board_of_directors.name: Leon Topalian
board_of_directors.background: Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer of Nucor Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Norma Clayton
board_of_directors.background: Former Vice President for Learning, Training and Development at The Boeing Company.

board_of_directors.name: Patrick Dempsey
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Barnes Group Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Christopher Kearney
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of SPX FLOW, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Joseph Rupp
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of Olin Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: John Walker
board_of_directors.background: Former Chief Executive Officer of Global Brass and Copper Holdings, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Nadja West
board_of_directors.background: Retired Lieutenant General in the United States Army and 44th Surgeon General of the U.S. Army.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Lamach
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Trane Technologies plc.

sources.source_description: Nucor Corporation Official Website - Leadership Page
